
Age Compositions {data-navmenu="Data Fits"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Age Comp Fits

```{r age_comp_grid}
# Show grid for each fleet, stacked vertically
age_fleets <- unique(mv$age_comp_fits$fleet)
age_sexes  <- unique(mv$age_comp_fits$sex)

plot_list <- list()
for (fl in age_fleets) {
  for (sx in age_sexes) {
    sub <- mv$age_comp_fits[
      mv$age_comp_fits$fleet == fl &
        mv$age_comp_fits$sex == sx,
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    if (nrow(sub) == 0) next
    lbl <- if (length(age_sexes) > 1) {
      paste(fl, "-", sx)
    } else {
      fl
    }
    p <- mv_plot_comp_grid(
      df      = sub,
      bin_col = "age",
      ylab    = "Proportion"
    )
    p <- layout(
      p = p,
      title = lbl
    )
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
  }
}

if (length(plot_list) == 1L) {
  plot_list[[1]]
} else {
  htmltools::tagList(plot_list)
}
```

### Age Comp Residual Bubbles

```{r age_resid_bubble}
if (!is.null(mv$age_comp_resids)) {
  resid_plots <- list()
  for (fl in age_fleets) {
    sub <- mv$age_comp_resids[
      mv$age_comp_resids$fleet == fl,
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    if (nrow(sub) == 0) next
    p <- mv_plot_bubble(
      df    = sub,
      x_col = "year",
      y_col = "age",
      title = fl
    )
    resid_plots[[length(resid_plots) + 1L]] <- p
  }
  if (length(resid_plots) == 1L) {
    resid_plots[[1]]
  } else {
    htmltools::tagList(resid_plots)
  }
}
```

### Mean Age Composition

```{r age_mean}
avg_plots <- list()
for (fl in age_fleets) {
  sub <- mv$age_comp_fits[
    mv$age_comp_fits$fleet == fl,
    , drop = FALSE
  ]
  if (nrow(sub) == 0) next
  p <- mv_plot_comp_avg(
    df      = sub,
    bin_col = "age",
    title   = paste("Mean -", fl)
  )
  avg_plots[[length(avg_plots) + 1L]] <- p
}
if (length(avg_plots) == 1L) {
  avg_plots[[1]]
} else {
  htmltools::tagList(avg_plots)
}
```

### Residual Diagnostics

```{r age_resid_panel}
if (!is.null(mv$age_comp_resids)) {
  diag_plots <- list()
  for (fl in age_fleets) {
    sub <- mv$age_comp_resids[
      mv$age_comp_resids$fleet == fl,
      , drop = FALSE
    ]
    if (nrow(sub) == 0) next
    p <- mv_plot_resid_panel(
      df    = sub,
      title = paste("Residual Diagnostics -", fl)
    )
    diag_plots[[length(diag_plots) + 1L]] <- p
  }
  if (length(diag_plots) == 1L) {
    diag_plots[[1]]
  } else {
    htmltools::tagList(diag_plots)
  }
}
```
